title: taraxacum grandisquamum
intro: Taraxacum grandisquamum, also known as the large-scaled dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use as a diuretic and a treatment for liver and gallbladder issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Taraxacum grandisquamum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, with its roots and leaves being commonly used for medicinal purposes.
